description_long: This modern cabin features a rectangular structure with a prominent shed roof sloping from front to back, constructed primarily from wood with a dark metal roof. The front facade is dominated by large, floor-to-ceiling glass doors and windows, framed by vertical wooden panels, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The side view reveals a deep roof overhang that provides shade and weather protection to the front porch area, which is integrated into the main structure. The rear of the cabin is more minimal, with a single horizontal window set into the otherwise solid wall, emphasizing privacy. The exterior wood cladding is arranged horizontally, giving the cabin a sleek, contemporary appearance. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional, open living spaces.
description: A modern, rectangular cabin with a sloped shed roof, large glass front doors, and wood cladding. The design is minimalist with a deep roof overhang and a single rear window.
description_view_0: Front view showing large glass doors and windows framed by wood, with a deep roof overhang and integrated porch.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sloped shed roof, deep overhang, and the open porch area beneath the roof.
description_view_2: Top view displaying the full expanse of the dark, ribbed metal shed roof with no visible openings.
description_view_3: Rear view featuring a single horizontal window set into a solid wood wall, with the roof sloping downward.
attribute_roof_type: shed roof with a single slope, deep overhang, and ribbed metal surface
attribute_window_arrangement: Three large, vertically oriented windows on the front facade, symmetrically arranged with a central glass door, and a single horizontal window on the rear wall
attribute_door_placement: One large glass door centered on the front facade, integrated with the window arrangement
